mission.title: vllm: [New Model]: Jamba (MoE Mamba from AI21)
mission.description: [New Model]: Jamba (MoE Mamba from AI21). Requested by 61+ users.

steps.title: Check current vllm setup
steps.description:
Verify your vllm version and configuration:
```bash
vllm version
```
This feature requires a working vllm installation.

steps.title: Review vllm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vllm configuration:
### The model to consider.

https://huggingface.co/ai21labs/Jamba-v0.1

### The closest model vllm already supports.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [New Model]: Jamba (MoE Mamba from AI21)
steps.description:
Add Jamba support to vLLM, 
This PR comprises three parts: 
1. The Jamba modeling file that encapsulates the Jamba model weights and logic itself and the mamba cache management.
2. Passage of the requests ids of the sequence groups and their sequence ids into the modeling file in order to be able to manage the cache.
3. Passage of the finished request ids into the modeling file as well in order the clean the allocated cache on finished requests

FIX #3690

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[New Model]: Jamba (MoE Mamba from AI21)" is functioning correctly.
